text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
A DM? Someone wants me to make them a beat
track, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(It's not often, but I do get requests now and
again to !monad, since it's my side account for
posting music.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Song composition's an analytical diversion and a
nice change of pace, but it's just a way to kill
time. I've got zero interest in making music for
other people. I'll just ignore—)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Another one? "Could you please make me a
track? You can have full artistic freedom over it.
I'd like to lay some vocals over your sound."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Full artistic freedom? They wouldn't give me that
if they were looking for a freebie or cheap labor.
Guess they want something that says "me," huh?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Geez... there's nothing logical about this.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Still, I've never put a piece together knowing it would have rap lyrics over it. I'm not getting any ideas here.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I could just edit some stock music and call it a
day... or...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, Shakur... It's almost time for lights out, so...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, I'll turn them off. Night.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Hmm... Shakur's not going to sleep, she's been
on her laptop this whole time... It looks like she's
listening to music.)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(She did the same thing after her last race, too.
She looked so troubled then. Maybe she's got
something on her mind again.)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I wonder if there's anything I can do to help...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while walking through the academy...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I get that you wanted to help, but of all people, this is who you went to for advice?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I thought she would be the best choice since
she's the most knowledgeable person on music I
know...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! The time has come for T.M. Opera O to take
the stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
When Doto asked me whether I knew of any
delightful music that might assuage your stress, I
knew the answer was right in front of us!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Shakur, choose! Would you prefer an
emotional hip-hop enka ballad by Doto or a
fabulous hip-hop opera by yours truly?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? The heck is that?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I heard that you were partial to hip-hop, you see,
so Doto and I thought to put on a show for you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll do my best to make the lyrics rhyme, so go
ahead and choose whichever of us you'd like!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey. You there. You choose.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You've been gawking at us the whole time,
haven't you? Choose whichever you like the
sound of. I won't be held responsible.
choice_data_list: Let's hear a hip-hop enka ballad.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Well, I can't say that I'm surprised!
Excellent choice! Please enjoy "My Beloved
Rhyme"! Now, da capo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The name is Opera O! You'll not find a better
Horsegirl than this here Horsegirl!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
O, rose-scented Opera O! What a fragrance I
infuse everywhere! ♪ Now, my loving audience,
let me see you put your hands up in the air!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And now, the fall of the curtain upon this hip-hopera shooooow! O sole miiiioooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That was zero percent hip-hop and zero percent
opera. It was straight up in the negatives.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The lyrics rhymed, though, yes? Besides, everything I, Opera O, perform constitutes an opera! Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The parameters of that definition are way too
loose.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But... I guess I get it. If it's something in my style they
want, anything I make'll fit the bill, so I'll just do
whatever I feel like.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho, it seems I've managed to bestow some
wisdom upon Shakur the sage! Goodness, it must
be criminal how incredible I am!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Doto, I owe you a lunch. And bring her with
you. Put some tape over her mouth first, though.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh! Thanks, Shakur! ...Wait, tape?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Listen, Doto. You'd better watch out. Don't go
overboard, or you'll land yourself in a world of
hurt.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but I want to do the best I can! Okay, MC Doto
is, um, in the house!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yo, yooo. ♪ I'm going to hit the redline with my
rhymes! ♪ Pedal to the metal, but don't do
crimes! La la la! ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ummm... ♪ I-Ice creeeam is delicious... It'll leave
you... incredulous. ♪ Dum-dee-dee-dummm... ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm! Wait, that melody just now...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Um, sometimes I overhear your music, so I
looked up one of the songs... S-sorry for being
nosy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But I thought if I learned about the things you
like, then we could talk about them, and it would
help you relax and improve your mood...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Doto...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that lousy enka performance not only got
rid of the tension in my body, but all my wits—as
well as the artist's block I was dealing with.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah! Oh, Shakuuur!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, I had no idea you were so troubled, Shakur!
In that case, let me imbue you with inspiration
and sing for you "The Glorious Return of Opera
O"!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Please don't.
